macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 Hits 2026 Low Amid Weekly Declines
items.summary: The S&P 500 closed at 6,632.19, down 0.61% on Friday and marking its lowest level of 2026 so far, while the Dow Jones dropped 119.38 points. Broader indices showed losses, with S&P 500 variants down 0.07% to 0.05% on March 11 amid ongoing market pressure.

items.title: US and Global Markets Sideways, Awaiting Fed Policy and Inflation Data
items.summary: US and global stock markets are pausing investments, moving sideways as investors await key inflation data and Federal Reserve monetary policy updates. Markets show risk-off sentiment with big tech like Microsoft, Snowflake, and Amazon hit by profit-taking and economic slowdown fears.

items.title: Hardware, Energy Sectors Bullish; Cloud, Crypto Stocks Decline
items.summary: Hardware and energy sectors continue bull market runs driven by data center demand, while big tech and chipmakers consolidate with profit-taking. Cloud software, e-commerce, and crypto-linked stocks suffered significant hits amid risk-off moves.

items.title: Gold and Oil Surge into Bull Markets on Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: Gold and oil prices have entered bull markets due to escalating geopolitical tensions, raising fears of supply shocks and stagflation. The US dollar remains sideways amid conflicting economic signals.

items.title: Crypto Enters Bear Market with Meme Coin Sell-Off
items.summary: Cryptocurrency markets have fully entered a bear market, with investors fleeing to safe-havens like gold; Bitcoin holds stronger than altcoins, but meme coins face massive sell-offs.

items.title: S&P Dow Jones Indices Report March Declines
items.summary: S&P 500-related indices showed declines as of March 11, 2026, with daily drops of -0.07% to 0.05% and weekly losses up to -2.29%, reflecting broader market weakness.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Cryptocurrency Market Enters Cautious Recovery on March 15, 2026
items.summary: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and altcoins show constructive sentiment amid capital inflows into ETFs, Bitcoin's macroeconomic sensitivity, and altcoin differentiation. Institutional demand supports the sector while regulatory and security factors remain key.

items.title: XRP Surges Over 3% on Ripple's Asia Payment License and Institutional Partnerships
items.summary: Ripple secures a license for Asian payment corridors with major Japanese and Indian banks building on XRP, plus Mastercard collaboration on CBDCs and DTC tokenization service launch planned for later 2026. XRP breaks out of downtrend amid institutional hype.

items.title: US Crypto Industry Spends $200M Targeting 2026 Midterms for Pro-Crypto Legislation
items.summary: Crypto sector pushes tax reforms like de minimis exemptions for small Bitcoin transactions and challenges Basel III's 1250% risk weight on Bitcoin. Debates intensify with Coinbase denying opposition and contrasts to Trump-era policies.

items.title: US CLARITY Act Faces Low 2026 Odds if Delayed Past April
items.summary: Galaxy Digital's Alex Thorn warns that if the CLARITY Act doesn't pass committee by end of April, 2026 passage likelihood is very low due to stablecoin rewards debates, DeFi issues, and lobbying conflicts. President Trump criticizes banks for delays.

items.title: Bitcoin Navigates 160-Day Correction from October 2025 High
items.summary: Bitcoin experiences a relatively short correction compared to past cycles, maintaining stability amid stock market weakness while Ethereum gets a boost from BlackRock's staked ETF.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch Game File Sizes Revealed
items.summary: eShop listings have disclosed file sizes for upcoming games on Nintendo Switch 2 and original Switch, ranging from 35MB to 30.3GB, with notable titles including MLB The Show 26 (30.3GB on Switch), Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage (25.5GB on Switch 2), and Shadow Tactics: Blades of the Shogun (7.4GB on Switch 2).

items.title: VALORANT Masters Santiago Concludes with NRG Victory
items.summary: The first global event of the 2026 VALORANT Champions Tour ran from February 28 to March 15, with twelve top teams competing for Championship Points and advancement toward Champions Shanghai. NRG secured victory in their match against PRX.

items.title: Garena Free Fire Max Redeem Codes Available
items.summary: Garena Free Fire Max players can unlock free rewards using 12-character alphanumeric redeem codes that are valid for a limited time.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
